description_long: This is a tall, octagonal woven basket or bucket with a dark, patterned body and a light-colored rim and handle. The main body appears to be constructed from interlaced synthetic or natural fibers, forming a tight, geometric weave with a subtle diamond motif. The rim and base are reinforced with a light tan material, likely bamboo or rattan, providing structural stability. A single, sturdy bail handle arches over the top, attached at two points on the rim, and is made from the same light material as the rim. The interior is open and hollow, suitable for carrying or storing items. The overall design suggests durability and utility, with a blend of traditional craftsmanship and modern materials.
description: A tall, octagonal woven basket with a patterned dark body, light tan rim, and a single bail handle. The structure is reinforced and open-topped, suitable for carrying or storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the octagonal shape, patterned weave, and the bail handle arching over the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular handle and the reinforced rim, with the weave pattern visible on the body.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the woven body and the handle attachment points.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle upright, emphasizing the octagonal structure and rim details.
